title: Turn-bundle pipeline — G-017 + Actions + G-002 update
q_summary: Build the full turn-bundle pipeline — unzip-and-route.yml, turn.json schema, G-017, updated G-002 slot 3 mandate
a_summary: Shipped unzip-and-route.yml (Actions workflow: unzip, route, SHA dedup, transcript assembly, Notion brain push), turn.json schema template, G-017 gist documenting full bundle spec, and updated G-002 replacing manual brain push with gitZip turn-close bundle as mandatory slot 3. Pipeline now fully self-contained: one push_files call per turn archives everything automatically.
decisions: gitZip + push_files is the right transport — no payload size ceiling vs inline MCP push
Option B (Actions) chosen over Option C (Cloudflare Worker) — build now, upgrade later
Three dedup layers: git native blobs, Actions SHA check, transcript CID guard
Manual brain push (append_note API call) retired — Actions handles it from turn.json
Slot 3 mandate updated in G-002: turn-close bundle push replaces brain push
open_questions: Does NOTION_TOKEN secret exist in repo Actions secrets? Needs verification.
unzip-and-route.yml triggers on .github/turn-bundles/** — need to also test direct turns/** push path
Charlie Section 3 status unknown — check inbox next session
